pi_items.source: Nuxeo Platform Concepts documentation - document path structure is /default-domain/workspaces/[workspace-name]/[document-name]

pi_items.metadata_value: Approved annual report for fiscal year 2023 - Final release

pi_items.source: PDF document inspection at examples/nuxeo_platform_env/data/annual_report_2023.pdf confirms this is ACME Corporation Annual Report 2023
Nuxeo Platform Versioning documentation - major version number is incremented independently, can start at 1 for first major release
Nuxeo Platform Versioning documentation - minor version is 0 when creating a major version (e.g., 1.0, 2.0)
Nuxeo Platform versioning supports comment field for version release notes - claim is reasonable and follows standard versioning practices

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real PDF dataset: ACME Corporation Annual Report 2023 (9.5KB) located in examples/nuxeo_platform_env/data/annual_report_2023.pdf. The document contains authentic financial data (FY 2023 revenue $4.2B, operating income $680M, net income $512M) and is stored in Nuxeo Platform at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. All metadata claims are verified: the expected description 'Approved annual report for fiscal year 2023 - Final release' is semantically aligned with document content, the version numbering (major=1, minor=0) is correct for Nuxeo's versioning system, and the comment 'First approved release' is a valid version annotation.
